creator: giffunip@tutopia.com
text:
Hello;

I finally did a new sweep and attempted to clean the issues noted by Bruce. I also added a couple of patches of his authorship(issue with a goal==0 and the clustering cleanups).
I tried to make the BSD licensed code (in particular *fs_inode.c) similar to the PRE_SOFTUPDATE tag.

The patch compiles on my system and a similar patch has been tested by Aditya Sarawgi for his Google SoC project.
